query: SELECT id, liverId, streamerName, CASE WHEN liverId IS NULL THEN 'NULL' WHEN liverId = 0 THEN 'ZERO' ELSE CAST(liverId AS CHAR) END as liver_status FROM brand_livestreams WHERE streamerName LIKE '%ryukyogoku%' LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT id, liverId, streamerName, CASE WHEN liverId IS NULL THEN 'NULL' WHEN liverId = 0 THEN 'ZERO' ELSE CAST(liverId AS CHAR) END as liver_status FROM brand_livestreams WHERE streamerName LIKE '%ryukyogoku%' LIMIT 5;
